summary: Comprehensive research on optimizing Lean 4 / Lake Mathlib builds for NixOS with AMD Ryzen AI 300: LEAN_NUM_THREADS=8 recommended, power-profiles-daemon balanced mode for sustained builds, earlyoom configuration updates, and optional systemd slice resource limits.

artifacts.summary: Lake build optimization research covering parallelism limits, CPU scheduling, memory management, I/O optimization, and thermal/power tradeoffs for Mathlib compilation on AMD Ryzen AI 300
